name: Momentum continuation stays on Tiger
notes: Checks that natural continuation language keeps the momentum result set on Tiger and returns the next page instead of falling back or repeating the same rows.

turns.user: What game has the most players right now?
turns.expectation: Should answer with a Tiger momentum ranking using the player-centric table shape.
Should continue the Tiger momentum result set instead of falling back or repeating the first page.

name: Semantic narrowing keeps the Tiger similarity set
notes: Checks Tiger semantic similarity plus natural narrowing on the continuable result set.

turns.user: Games similar to Hollow Knight with fewer than 10K reviews
turns.expectation: Should establish a Tiger semantic similarity result set.
Should reuse the Tiger similarity result set and apply the Steam Deck refinement on Tiger.

name: Entity switching uses named alternates
notes: Checks that Tiger uses natural alternate switching instead of robotic commands and that explicit switching stays on Tiger.

turns.user: What changed on Hades II before and after its last big update?
turns.expectation: Should answer for Hades II and mention Hades as a natural alternate if relevant.
Should switch to Hades on the Tiger path and answer the same family again.

name: Single-entity follow-up keeps the prior family
notes: Checks the newer 'what about' behavior for single-entity change prompts.

turns.user: What changed on Hades II before and after its last big update?
turns.expectation: Should establish the change-explanation family on Tiger.
Should keep the change-explanation family and pivot to DVD Survivors.

name: Unrelated prompt resets stale entity context
notes: Checks that a prior entity-specific selection does not leak into a later unrelated catalog prompt.

turns.user: What changed on Hades II before and after its last big update?
turns.expectation: Should establish Hades II change context.

turns.user: what are the top indie games currently?
turns.expectation: Should answer an unrelated Tiger catalog prompt without carrying Hades context forward.

name: Catalog result sets support comparison follow-ups
notes: Checks that a Tiger catalog result set can be reused in a natural comparison follow-up without dropping to the old loop.

turns.user: Show me all games by FromSoftware
turns.expectation: Should establish a Tiger catalog result set for FromSoftware games.
Should answer from the constrained Tiger result set rather than fall back or ask a generic unrelated follow-up.

name: Review-trend pivots keep the same Tiger family
notes: Checks that review-sentiment prompts stay Tiger-owned across narrowing, timeframe pivots, and drill-downs before an unrelated reset.

turns.user: Which popular games are getting worse reviews lately?
turns.expectation: Should establish a Tiger review-sentiment screen.
Should keep the same Tiger review-sentiment family while narrowing scope to indie titles.
Should keep the review-sentiment family and pivot the same screen to a 7-day window.

turns.user: what changed for the top one?
turns.expectation: Should drill from the visible Tiger screen into a Tiger change explanation for the first result.

turns.user: what are the top indie games currently?
turns.expectation: Should reset stale review-trend context and answer the unrelated Tiger discovery prompt cleanly.

name: Review-trend result sets continue on Tiger
notes: Checks that natural continuation language keeps a Tiger review-trend result set on Tiger instead of rerouting or falling back.

turns.user: Which popular games are getting worse reviews lately?
turns.expectation: Should establish a Tiger review-sentiment screen.
Should continue the Tiger result set instead of restarting the prompt or falling back.
